name: ASBURY AUTOMOTIVE GROUP INC
business: Asbury Automotive Group is a franchised automotive retailer in the United States, selling new and used vehicles, parts and service, and finance and insurance products through its dealerships and TCA subsidiary.

exposures.sentence: In addition, we saw increased demand for new electric vehicles before the expiration of federal tax credits in September 2025.
any data security breaches occurring, including with regard to personally identifiable information ("PII");
Total Care Auto, Powered by Asbury ("TCA" or "TCA Business"), our finance and insurance ("F&I") product provider

catalysts.event: TCA product rollout to all dealerships
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete the rollout to all of our dealerships in 2026 by offering TCA products on our Herb Chambers platform; however, no assurance can be given that the rollout will be completed within the timeframe contemplated.
